caption: The video captures a professional interview taking place at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated at a round table equipped with a laptop and some papers, suggesting a formal discussion or presentation. The man on the right is actively speaking, using hand gestures to emphasize his points, while the man on the left listens attentively. The background shows a spacious conference hall with other attendees and booths, indicating a bustling event environment. The setting and attire of the participants reflect the professional nature of the event, likely focusing on technology and database solutions provided by MongoDB.
